codeReview.summary: Fix properly addresses the original failure. The implementation adds getWaveform(id: string): Promise<number[]> to the preload.ts interface and contextBridge, wires up the file:waveform IPC handler in main.ts, and implements getWaveformData() using ffmpeg to extract normalized audio amplitude peaks.

summary: The fix correctly implements the missing getWaveform method. The prior review identified that preload.ts exposed probeFile but not getWaveform as required by the feature description and AGENTS.md. This fix adds: (1) getWaveform to ElectronAPI interface in preload.ts, (2) getWaveform invocation via ipcRenderer.invoke('file:waveform', id) in the contextBridge, (3) file:waveform IPC handler in main.ts, and (4) getWaveformData() function that uses ffmpeg to extract audio and compute normalized amplitude peaks (0-1 range). All verification steps (typecheck, test, lint, build) passed. The worker followed the backend-worker skill procedure correctly.
